---
id: validate-campaign
title: "Validate campaign IPFS CID"
description: "Checks if an IPFS CID links to a valid Merkle airdrop campaign file."
sidebar_label: "Validate campaign IPFS CID"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/airdrops/merkle-api/sablier-merkle-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Validate campaign IPFS CID"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/api/validity"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Checks if an IPFS CID links to a valid Merkle airdrop campaign file.

This endpoint:

1. Retrieves the campaign's IPFS file
2. Runs sanity checks on the file contents
3. Returns campaign metadata if valid

This route is used to perform sanity checks before allowing admins to create campaigns in the UI, since users may
accidentally provide invalid IPFS CIDs.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"} children={"Request"}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "cid",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "IPFS content identifier to validate",
      schema: { type: "string", example: "QmYwAPJzv5CZsnA625s3Xf2nemtYgPpHdWEz79ojWnPbdG" },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "CID is valid and links to a valid campaign file",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["cid", "recipients", "root", "total"],
            properties: {
              cid: {
                type: "string",
                description: "IPFS content identifier for the uploaded file",
                example: "QmYwAPJzv5CZsnA625s3Xf2nemtYgPpHdWEz79ojWnPbdG",
              },
              recipients: { type: "string", description: "Expected number of recipients", example: "1000" },
              root: {
                type: "string",
                description: "HEX root of the Merkle tree",
                pattern: "^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$",
                example: "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef",
              },
              total: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Expected amount of assets required by the campaign",
                example: "1000000000000000000000",
              },
            },
            title: "ValidityResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "Invalid request (e.g., invalid CID format)",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "CID not found or file is not a valid campaign",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "Internal server error",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
